betterquesting:10.desc:8:
ME Glass Cable is the basic cable, carrying 8 channels per line. Available in 16 colors for color-coded networks.

Glass cables connect machines, buses, and other cables. Each device on the network consumes channels from the cable it connects to. A single glass cable supports up to 8 devices.

Fluix-colored glass cable (meta 16) is the default. Use a Color Applicator to recolor cables.

Tip: Use different cable colors to create isolated sub-networks on the same physical cable run.
